heading: Purchase a Subscription
body:
To purchase a subscription, you can contact
[MongoDB Sales](https://www.mongodb.com/company/contact?tck=docs) or purchase one through
a marketplace.

When you purchase a subscription, you are asked to provide a
*billing contact* email address. Your billing contact receives invoices.

> **Note:** MongoDB recommends inviting your billing contact to your
> subscription-paying organization.
